value.body:
## Summary

Upgrade Tailwind CSS packages from 4.3.0 to 4.3.1 across the workspace.

## Packages

- `@tailwindcss/vite`: 4.3.0 -> 4.3.1
- `tailwindcss`: 4.3.0 -> 4.3.1

## Affected manifests

- `packages/desktop/package.json`
- `packages/ui/package.json`

## Rationale

`pnpm outdated --recursive --format json` reports patch releases for Tailwind and the Vite integration. Keep the compiler and plugin versions aligned across desktop and UI packages.

## Verification

- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop build`.
- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/ui storybook:build`.
- Run `pnpm check`.
value.title: Upgrade Tailwind CSS packages to 4.3.1
